About Us

Why Guests Choose Qadiri Palace

Situated in the heart of Nagore, we have been providing comfortable and affordable accommodation to pilgrims and travellers for decades. Our focus is simple: clean rooms, honest service, and a safe stay for your family.

🧹

Clean & Hygienic

Rooms cleaned and sanitised daily by our trained housekeeping team.

👨‍👩‍👧

Family-Friendly

Safe, quiet, and welcoming environment for families with children.

🕌

Near Nagore Dargah

Walking distance — just 1 minute to the sacred Nagore Dargah Shareef.

🔐

Safe & Secure

24/7 security, CCTV coverage, and a dedicated reception team always available.

🍽️

Halal Food Nearby

Several excellent halal restaurants within walking distance of the hotel.

Guest Testimonials

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★ 4.8 / 5  — based on 400+ reviews
"
★★★★★

Very clean and comfortable rooms. The hotel is literally a 1-minute walk from the Dargah. Staff were very helpful and accommodating. Will definitely come back.

AM
Abdul Malik
Chennai
"
★★★★★

Best budget stay in Nagore. The family room was spacious, clean, and had everything we needed. My kids felt very safe and comfortable. Highly recommended!

SF
Sumayya Fathima
Hyderabad
"
★★★★☆

Good value for money. The non-AC room was well-maintained and hygienic. Peaceful atmosphere. Easy to book via WhatsApp — got instant confirmation.

MR
Mohammed Rizwan
Bangalore
"
★★★★★

Stayed 3 nights with my family during the Urs season. The hotel managed everything smoothly. Parking was available, food stalls nearby, and the location is perfect.

IH
Irfan Hussain
Madurai
"
★★★★★

I was impressed by how clean and well-organised everything was. The AC rooms are great value. Staff on duty were polite and helped us immediately. Jazakallah Khair!

ZB
Zainab Begum
Mumbai
"
★★★★☆

Visited for a short pilgrimage trip. The hotel was affordable, clean, and very conveniently located. Would recommend to anyone visiting Nagore Dargah.
